title: C2PA Manifest Store — Specification v2.0
description: JSON schema for a C2PA Manifest Store as defined in C2PA Technical Specification v2.0. This was a major breaking revision: claim.v2 replaced claim.v1, claim_generator_info replaced the free-text claim_generator, assertions split into created/gathered, and the trust model moved to X.509-only with the C2PA Trust List.

claim_structure.old: c2pa.claim — single 'assertions' array, free-text 'claim_generator' string, 'dc:format' field
claim_structure.new: c2pa.claim.v2 — 'created_assertions' + 'gathered_assertions' split, 'claim_generator_info' object array, 'dc:format' removed, assertion metadata removed from claim

breaking_changes_from_v1_x.trust_model: Only X.509 certificates may be used for signing. C2PA Trust List established as default. Human actor identification moved out of signing context.
breaking_changes_from_v1_x.validation: validation_state not yet present as a top-level field (added in v2.1). Only flat validation_status array.
removed_fields: claim.dc:format — asset format moved to ingredient
claim.metadata — assertion metadata removed from claim level
claim.claim_generator (string) — replaced by claim_generator_info object array

added_assertion_labels.c2pa.actions.v2: Introduced in 1.3, enhanced in v2.0 with digitalSourceType per-action field
added_assertion_labels.c2pa.ingredient.v2: Predecessor to v3; adds data and description fields

deprecated_assertion_labels.c2pa.actions: v1 deprecated in favor of c2pa.actions.v2
deprecated_assertion_labels.c2pa.hash.bmff: v1 deprecated in favor of c2pa.hash.bmff.v2

validation_status.description: Flat validation status list. validation_results not yet available in v2.0.

Manifest.description: In v2.0, manifests use claim.v2. claim.v1 manifests (from 1.x assets) may still be read.

claim_generator.description: Present in claim v1 manifests (1.x assets) only. Replaced by claim_generator_info in v2.0.

claim_generator_info.description: Required in claim.v2 (v2.0+). Replaces free-text claim_generator.

ClaimGeneratorInfo.description: Introduced in claim.v2 (v2.0). May contain additional vendor-specific keys.

icon.description: HashedUri or HashedExternalUri reference to generator icon.

Ingredient.description: In v2.0, ingredient assertions may be c2pa.ingredient (v1) or c2pa.ingredient.v2. The 'inputTo' relationship value was added later (v2.1 via v3).

relationship.description: In v2.0: parentOf and componentOf. 'inputTo' added in v2.1.
